texto: Remember, there's sacrifice invovled in any kind of life. Even the man who chooses the safe way has to give up the thrill of combat. The point is that once you know what you want, you must be prepared to sacrifice everything to get it. Those who realize this are the fortunate ones. Those who know and can try. What more can a man as kfor than that?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John Allyn que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Remember, there's sacrifice invovled in any kind of life. Even the man who chooses the safe way h…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, sacrifice, those, com foco em reflexao.
